hero.name: I am Franck AYENAN
hero.subtitle: Passionate about building robust and high-performance backend solutions, I turn your ideas into smooth and flexible applications.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who am I?
about.name: AYENAN D. K. Franck Dieu-donné
about.description1: Backend developer with more than two years of experience and passionate about building high-performance APIs. My expertise is based on Laravel, Node.js, as well as data analysis with Python and Power BI.
about.description2: I am interested in designing well-structured applications, with a strong focus on clean and maintainable architecture. My goal is to build reliable, scalable solutions adapted to real user needs.

items.title: Web Developer
bullets: Designed and developed REST APIs with Laravel, structuring business logic to simplify processing and avoid inconsistencies.
Integrated third-party APIs to handle user actions and keep data updated accordingly.
Diagnosed and fixed issues while continuously improving application stability.
Implemented real-time notification systems to improve user experience.
Designed and structured secure REST API architectures (role management, authentication, data validation).

items.title: Academic Internship (Full Stack Developer)
bullets: Contributed to web application development with Laravel while following a clear and maintainable architecture.
Set up test scenarios to validate features before production release.
Contributed to the design of modules based on user needs.

items.title: Academic Internship (WordPress Developer)
bullets: Designed and deployed websites using WordPress.
Customised themes and plugins to meet specific functional requirements.
Improved site visibility through SEO optimisation.
Analysed needs and modelled features in the early stages.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: My work
projects.description: A selection of projects demonstrating my skills in API design and backend architecture.

items.title: EcoTrack API
items.description: Supply chain traceability system with QR codes and GPS checkpoints. Logistic fraud detection and IoT support.

items.title: Smart Mobility Analytics
items.description: NYC taxi trip data analysis platform. Complete ETL pipeline and Power BI dashboard.

items.title: ProjetLivre API
items.description: REST API for a book e-commerce platform. Sanctum authentication, cart management, payments, and automatic balance transfer.

items.title: ForYou API
items.description: Complete VTC application API. GPS distance calculation, fare estimation, multi-method payments, and FCM notifications, etc.

items.title: GesCom
items.description: Commercial management system for shops. Incoming/outgoing management, invoicing, and stock alerts.

items.title: Pomemon API
items.description: CRUD in Node.js with Sequelize for a card collection app. JWT authentication and Swagger documentation.

items.degree: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer and Software Systems
items.description: Training in software development, databases, algorithms, computer project management, etc.
items.thesis: Setting up a platform for service and product offers for artisans: the case of Benin

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.description: Do you have a project in mind or an opportunity to discuss? Feel free to contact me.

footer.name: Franck AYENAN
